subcodes.first_line: A Book hath been sent down from Our presence; verily it is the Lamp of Guidance amongst all peoples, and the Sign of the Ancient of Days amidst the nations, and the Remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل من لدنا انه لمصباح الهدی بین الوری و آیه القدم بین الامم و الذکر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @life and death, @firmness in the Covenant
